mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yw_auth_level ( name, member_id, level_id,score ) SELECT e.name as name,
#{param.memberId} AS member_id, e.id AS level_id, e.score FROM yw_level e WHERE e.id = #{param.levelId}

INSERT INTO yw_auth_condition ( name, level_id, member_id, auth_id, condi_id ) SELECT e.name as name, #{levelId} AS level_id, #{memberId} AS member_id, #{authId} AS auth_id, e.id AS condi_id FROM yw_level_condition e WHERE e.level_id = #{levelId}

INSERT INTO yw_auth_detail ( name, member_id, level_id, auth_id, detail_id ) SELECT e.name as name, #{levelId} AS level_id, #{memberId} AS member_id, #{authId} AS auth_id, e.id AS detail_id FROM yw_level_group_detail e
mapper.select: select a.*, b.score, b.exclude_level_id, c.name as norm_name, c.introduce as norm_introduce, c.max_score as norm_score, c.input_type, c.id as norm_id, d.name as group_name, d.introduce as group_introduce, d.max_score as group_score, d.id as group_id from yw_auth_detail a inner join yw_level_group_detail b on a.detail_id=b.id inner join yw_level_group_norm c on b.norm_id=c.id inner join yw_level_group d on c.group_id=d.id where a.auth_id=#{authId} order by group_id,norm_id,detail_id

select a.*, b.introduce, b.iz_force, b.input_type, d.status as comment_status, d.bz ,d.id as comment_id from yw_auth_condition a inner join yw_level_condition b on a.condi_id=b.id inner join yw_auth_level c on a.auth_id=c.id and CONCAT(',', c.teacher, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{memberId}, ',%') left join yw_auth_comment d on d.auth_id=c.id and d.comment_type='CONDI' and d.teacher_id =#{memberId} and d.detail_id=a.id where a.auth_id=#{authId} and a.iz_selected='1' order by b.id

select a.*, b.score, b.exclude_level_id, c.name as norm_name, c.introduce as norm_introduce, c.max_score as norm_score, c.input_type, c.id as norm_id, d.name as group_name, d.introduce as group_introduce, d.max_score as group_score, d.id as group_id, f.status as comment_status, f.bz ,f.id as comment_id from yw_auth_detail a inner join yw_level_group_detail b on a.detail_id=b.id inner join yw_level_group_norm c on b.norm_id=c.id inner join yw_level_group d on c.group_id=d.id inner join yw_auth_level e on a.auth_id=e.id and CONCAT(',', e.teacher, ',') LIKE CONCAT('%,', #{memberId}, ',%') left join yw_auth_comment f on f.auth_id=e.id and f.comment_type='DETAIL' and f.detail_id=a.id and f.teacher_id=#{memberId} where a.auth_id=#{authId} and a.iz_selected='1' order by group_id,norm_id,detail_id

SELECT a.id, CAST(COALESCE(addr.level_id, a.level_id) AS CHAR) AS certNo, lv.name AS certName, mu.name AS userName, mu.idcard AS idCard, NULL AS certImageUrl, a.update_time AS issueDate FROM yw_auth_level a INNER JOIN member_user mu ON a.member_id = mu.id LEFT JOIN yw_member_level_address addr ON addr.member_id = a.member_id AND addr.level_id = a.level_id LEFT JOIN yw_level lv ON lv.id = a.level_id WHERE a.status = '10' AND (mu.izteacher IS NULL OR mu.izteacher <> 1)
AND mu.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqVO.name}, '%')
AND mu.idcard LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqVO.idCardSuffix})
AND CAST(COALESCE(addr.level_id, a.level_id) AS CHAR) = #{reqVO.certNo}
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.id, CAST(COALESCE(addr.level_id, a.level_id) AS CHAR) AS certNo, lv.name AS certName, mu.name AS userName, mu.idcard AS idCard, NULL AS certImageUrl, a.update_time AS issueDate FROM yw_auth_level a INNER JOIN member_user mu ON a.member_id = mu.id LEFT JOIN yw_member_level_address addr ON addr.member_id = a.member_id AND addr.level_id = a.level_id LEFT JOIN yw_level lv ON lv.id = a.level_id WHERE a.status = '10' AND mu.izteacher = 1
AND mu.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqVO.name}, '%')
AND mu.idcard LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reqVO.idCardSuffix})
AND CAST(COALESCE(addr.level_id, a.level_id) AS CHAR) = #{reqVO.certNo}
ORDER BY a.update_time DESC, a.id DESC
